inputs.label: Little interest or pleasure in doing things (last 2 weeks)
inputs.businessContext: Response to PHQ-2 question 1: 0=Not at all, 1=Several days, 2=More than half the days, 3=Nearly every day.

label_i18n.en: Little interest or pleasure in doing things (last 2 weeks)
label_i18n.tr: Son 2 hafta boyunca işlere karşı ilgi veya zevk azlığı
label_i18n.de: Wenig Interesse oder Freude an Tätigkeiten (letzte 2 Wochen)
label_i18n.fr: Peu d'intérêt ou de plaisir à faire des choses (2 dernières semaines)
label_i18n.es: Poco interés o placer en hacer cosas (últimas 2 semanas)
label_i18n.ar: Little interest or pleasure in doing things (last 2 weeks)

businessContext_i18n.en: Response to PHQ-2 question 1: 0=Not at all, 1=Several days, 2=More than half the days, 3=Nearly every day.
businessContext_i18n.tr: PHQ-2 sorusu 1 yanıtı: 0=Hiç, 1=Birkaç gün, 2=Günlerin yarısından fazlası, 3=Hemen her gün.
businessContext_i18n.de: Antwort auf PHQ-2 Frage 1: 0=Überhaupt nicht, 1=An mehreren Tagen, 2=An mehr als der Hälfte der Tage, 3=Fast jeden Tag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réponse à la question 1 du PHQ-2 : 0=Pas du tout, 1=Plusieurs jours, 2=Plus de la moitié des jours, 3=Presque tous les jours.
businessContext_i18n.es: Respuesta a la pregunta 1 del PHQ-2: 0=Nada, 1=Varios días, 2=Más de la mitad de los días, 3=Casi todos los días.

inputs.label: Feeling down, depressed, or hopeless (last 2 weeks)
